name: Elven Mint
effect: The base chance to find Faction Coins is increased multiplicatively by 150%.

name: Elven Treasure Casing
effect: Increase base clicking reward by +25,000 per Trophy unlocked. Increase FC find chance based on Trophies.
formula: +(1 + 0.1 * x) ^ 0.95)%, where x is Trophies unlocked

name: Ancient Clicking Arts
effect: Increase Mana Regeneration based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.25), where x is clicks this Reincarnation

name: Elven Emissary
effect: Increase clicking reward based on Good buildings owned. Assistants find 3x as many Faction Coins.
formula: (x ^ 0.6)%, where x is Good buildings owned

name: Elven Efficiency
effect: Increase Royal Exchange bonus based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is FC found this Era

name: Secret Clicking Techniques
effect: Increase the production of all buildings based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (2 * x ^ 0.4)%, where x is clicks this Reincarnation

name: Elven Diplomacy
effect: Clicks count more based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is FC found this Era

name: Elven Luck
effect: Each click has a 1% chance to produce 2500% of total production in coins and generate bonus Faction Coins. Assistants trigger this once per second.
formula: Production: (2500 * (x + y)); FC: (x * (R+1)), where R is reincarnations

name: Sylvan Treasure Frills
effect: Additively increase base clicking reward by 50% of your building production.

name: Wooden Dice
effect: Increase Elven Luck chance and effects based on highest Arboreal Cities this Reincarnation. Also triggers 100,000 Tax Collections on Luck proc.
formula: Luck chance: +(x ^ 0.4)%; Prod: (40 * x ^ 0.8)%, where x is highest Arboreal Cities

name: Camouflage
effect: Assistants and Clicks count 1,000% more for all purposes. Increase assistant production based on assistants owned.
formula: (2 * ln(1 + x) ^ 2)%, where x is assistants owned

name: Elven Discipline
effect: Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(50 * ln(1 + x) ^ 1.5) additive; (1.5 * log10(1 + x) ^ 1.5)% multiplicative, where x is FC this Era
